name: KING OLLY | PAPER MARIO THE ORIGAMI KING - PMTOK
description:
He’s doing his best to learn quickly about his sentience and how he’s basically a “villain” in Mario’s terms, so he got himself a manual. He doesn’t know why he’s supposed to have a lover, but he might as well do it since kidnapping is DEFINITELY not an option.

The villain x assistant trope but make it sillier
creator: Vt.wav
